title: HumanX Mobile Proof Mini App Specification
summary: Implementation completed and simplified for the HumanX World Mini App GOALS.md flow.
next_action: Provide production World credentials, X OAuth credentials, HTTPS hosting, support email, and final PNG assets before World App Store submission.
blockers: World App Store submission still requires real Developer Portal app id, RP id, signing key, X OAuth credentials, production HTTPS URL, support email, and final exported PNG store assets.

verification.notes: Passed pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm verify:goals, pnpm build, Spectacula lifecycle validation, and git diff --check after simplifying to the five GOALS.md stories. Format gate skipped because no formatter script is configured. Final vetting skipped because review_policy.final_vetting is off for plain spectacula.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Simplified implementation to the five GOALS.md stories and added a machine-checkable goal contract test.
resume_context.notes: Self-review confirmed the app includes X login, MiniKitProvider, IDKit proof flow, backend RP signatures, World verifier forwarding, signal hash enforcement, file-backed proof persistence, public proof pages, same-window X Web Intent navigation, store submission documentation, and app icon/content-card source assets.

history.note: Spec completed from GOALS.md and current World/X docs.
